questions: how to treat burn at home
agun e pore gele ki korbo
answers: For burns, immediately run cool (not ice cold) water over the area for at least 10-20 minutes. Don't apply ice, butter, or toothpaste. Cover with a clean bandage and see a doctor if it's severe.
Pore gele first e thanda pani diye 10-20 minute dhoun. Borf ba toothpaste lagaben na. Clean kapor diye cover korun and doctor er kache jan jodi beshi pore thake.

Burn treatment depends on severity. First degree: cool water + aloe vera. Second degree: cool water, don't pop blisters, bandage it. Third degree: call emergency immediately, don't remove clothing stuck to skin.
Pora jaygay shitol pani chalun minimum 10 minute. Ghee, toothpaste, ba borf lagaben na — eta worse kore. Foskay uthle futaben na. Doctor dekhano dorkar hole beshi deri korben na.
